ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental entry */,
  "instant" INTEGER /* Sequential record number */,
  "dteday" TEXT /* Date of the rental */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Indicator if the day is a holiday (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "weekday_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the day of the week */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Indicator if the day is a working day (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "weathersit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather situation */,
  "temp" REAL /* Normalized temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Normalized feeling temperature in Celsius */,
  "hum" REAL /* Normalized humidity */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Normalized windspeed */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Number of casual users */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered users */,
  "cnt" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time of the rental start */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time of the rental end */,
  "total_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Total duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "start_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting location */,
  "end_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending location */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_start_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_end_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_weathersit_id FOREIGN KEY ("weathersit_id") REFERENCES weathersits ("weathersit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_weekday_id FOREIGN KEY ("weekday_id") REFERENCES weekdays ("weekday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Spring, Summer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year (e.g., 2018, 2019) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month (e.g., January, February) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekdays" (
  "weekday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekday */,
  "weekday_name" TEXT /* Name of the weekday (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weekday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weathersits" (
  "weathersit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather situation */,
  "weathersit_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather situation (e.g., Clear, Mist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather situation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weathersit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., casual, registered) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date of the rental */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Location where the rental started */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Location where the rental ended */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  "total_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Total duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, mobile payment) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rentals_start_location FOREIGN KEY ("start_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rentals_end_location FOREIGN KEY ("end_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Station A) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of bikes that can be parked at the location */,
  "current_bike_count" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently at the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the location is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "temp" REAL /* Normalized temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Normalized feeling temperature in Celsius */,
  "hum" REAL /* Normalized humidity */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Normalized windspeed */,
  "weathersit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather situation */,
  "forecast_accuracy" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the forecast (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_weathersit_id FOREIGN KEY ("weathersit_id") REFERENCES weathersits ("weathersit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was manufactured */,
  "last_serviced_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was last serviced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, in use, out of service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)
